summary: Phase 3.7b Testing Complete - i18n multilingual support (DE/EN), 4 test accounts, consent/teacher APIs, email config. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend i18n tests passed across 8 public pages.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation uses react-i18next with localStorage persistence - works correctly
Legal pages (impressum/agb/privacy) correctly show EN disclaimer banner when in English mode while keeping German legal text
Mobile language switcher (data-testid='mobile-lang-de/en') works correctly in mobile nav
All 4 seeded accounts (admin, staff, teacher, applicant) login successfully
Consent API returns proper GDPR-compliant consent type definitions
Teacher API correctly requires authentication and role-based access
seed_data_creation: 4 accounts seeded via seed.py (admin uses ADMIN_PASSWORD, others use SEED_DEV_PASSWORD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7b complete. i18n works on all public pages (/, /courses, /services, /contact, /apply, /legal, /agb, /privacy). Language toggle persists via localStorage. Legal pages show EN disclaimer in English mode. All 4 role accounts work. Teacher role has backend APIs only (no frontend dashboard yet). Cost simulator is MOCKED internally.
passed_checks: Backend: Health endpoint returns OK with email_enabled=true
Backend: GET /api/consents/types returns teacher_data_access consent definition
Backend: Admin login (admin@studienkolleg-aachen.de / Admin@2026!) - role: superadmin
Backend: Staff login (staff@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - role: staff
Backend: Teacher login (teacher@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - role: teacher
Backend: Applicant login (applicant@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - role: applicant
Backend: Invalid login returns 401
Backend: GET /api/teacher/assignments requires auth (401 without)
Backend: Teacher can list own assignments
Backend: Teacher can access /api/teacher/my-students
Backend: Staff can list all assignments
Backend: Applicant cannot access teacher assignments (403)
Backend: Applicant can view own consents
Frontend: Homepage i18n toggle (DE/EN) works
Frontend: /courses page i18n works
Frontend: /services page i18n works
Frontend: /contact page i18n works
Frontend: /apply page form labels translate correctly
Frontend: /legal (Impressum) shows EN disclaimer in English mode
Frontend: /agb (Terms) shows EN disclaimer in English mode
Frontend: /privacy shows EN disclaimer in English mode
Frontend: Footer translates correctly (DE: Standort & Kontakt, EN: Location & Contact)
Frontend: Desktop nav language switcher (DE|EN) visible and functional
Frontend: Mobile nav language switcher (data-testid='mobile-lang-de/en') works
Frontend: Admin login via UI redirects to /staff dashboard
